center.name: 秘魯涼流
center.summary: 秘魯涼流是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括灰背信天翁、Elliot's storm petrel、Markham's storm petrel等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: gracilis, which is found in the Humboldt Current off Peru and Chile, and O

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: thumb|left|alt=Map showing coast of Peru and Chile with color-coding indicating populations of this bird|upright=1.7|Map showing the distribution of the main genetic clades of Markham's storm petrel, based on a 2021 study Markham's storm petrel inhabits waters of the Humboldt Current in the Pacific Ocean off Ecuador, Peru, and northern Chile. As these birds spend most of their lives at sea, they are considered to be endemic to the Humboldt Current. The birds may venture as far north as southern Mexico (18°N); as far south as central Chile (30°S); and as far west as 118°W

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The ringed storm petrel (Hydrobates hornbyi), also known as Hornby's storm petrel, is a seabird that ranges in the Humboldt Current off the coasts of South America

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It ranges in latitude from the pack-ice around Antarctica, with the southernmost record from 78°S in the Ross Sea, to about 35°S, with occasional sightings further north along the Humboldt Current
